item.name: upload
Microsoft Azure Uploads Data And Creates A New Dataset

formdata.description: The name of this dataset (always add this string for any dataset).
Optional description of this dataset.
The locale of this dataset (always add this string for any dataset).
The kind of the dataset (always add this string for any dataset). Possible values are "Language", "Acoustic", "Pronunciation".
Optional properties of this dataset (json serialized object with key/values, where all values must be strings)
A zip file containing the audio data (this and the audio archive file for acoustic datasets).
A text file containing the transcriptions for the audio data (this and the transcriptions file for acoustic datasets).
A text file containing the language or pronunciation data (only this file for language datasets).

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The request was accepted and the response contains the location of the entity.
